headline: Constellation Energy Refocuses On Low Carbon Power With $5b Gas Sale
summary: Constellation Energy agreed to sell about 4.4 GW of natural gas fired power plants to LS Power for $5b. The sale is tied to antitrust conditions set by US regulators following Constellation Energy's acquisition of Calpine. The transaction reshapes Constellation Energy's generation portfolio and affects competition in several US power markets. For investors watching NasdaqGS:CEG, this portfolio reshuffle sits against an eventful share price backdrop. The stock last closed at $316.47, with a...

headline: Forget Savings Accounts and Buy These 2 Utility ETFs Instead
summary: High-yield savings accounts looked like the obvious choice two years ago, when the Fed funds rate sat above 5% and online banks were handing out 5% APY with no strings attached. That window is closing. The Fed funds rate is now 3.75%, down from a high of 4.5% as recently as late 2025, and savings ... Forget Savings Accounts and Buy These 2 Utility ETFs Instead
